headlines.title: Supreme Court rules Trump cannot fire Fed Governor Lisa Cook for now
headlines.summary: The ruling by the Supreme Court means that Lisa Cook will remain as a Federal Reserve governor as her lawsuit challenging Trump's effort to fire her proceeds.

headlines.title: Comcast jumps 9% after announcing it will spin off NBCUniversal and Sky from cable business
headlines.summary: Comcast said it will separate into two publicly traded companies through a tax-free spinoff of NBCUniversal and Sky.

headlines.title: Trump says U.S. and Iran to hold fresh talks in Qatar on Tuesday following weekend clashes
headlines.summary: The U.S. and Iran are poised to hold fresh talks on Tuesday in Qatar's capital, President Donald Trump said via social media on Monday.

headlines.title: Trump bought as much as $5 million in Axon stock before ICE sought $220 million Taser deal
headlines.summary: Axon Enterprise has ramped up lobbying in Congress on federal law enforcement technology as ICE pursues a potential $220 million Taser deal.

headlines.title: Putin’s fuel shortage admission signals growing strain on Russia’s energy infrastructure
headlines.summary: Putin's comments mark the first time he has detailed the extent to which Ukraine's deep-strike successes have hampered Russia's fuel production.

headlines.title: SpaceX's $25 billion bond sale drives huge demand - and a potential headache for investors
headlines.summary: SpaceX’s $25 billion debt sale drew heavy demand, but analysts warn of capital spending, refinancing and investor concentration risks.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts are bullish on these 3 stocks for strong long-term growth potential
headlines.summary: Amid volatility in global markets, top analysts can help investors look past near-term noise and pick attractive stocks with long-term potential.

headlines.title: SpaceX to join the Nasdaq-100 in a fast-tracked process that will drive huge ETF buying demand
headlines.summary: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.

headlines.title: OpenAI is reportedly delaying its IPO. Here's when Kalshi traders think it will announce
headlines.summary: Speculators think the OpenAI IPO will come early next year, with only one-in-three odds it happens in 2026 but a high likelihood it is done by June 2027.

headlines.title: Jeremy Grantham says, 'This is the most expensive market in American history'
headlines.summary: Jeremy Grantham says soaring valuations around AI makes the U.S. stock market historically expensive.

headlines.title: Bitcoin is having a tough year. Traders are betting it's going to get worse
headlines.summary: Options traders are treating this break like it could be the tip of an iceberg.

headlines.title: Traders are getting worried the chip stock bull market is cracking. How to protect yourself
headlines.summary: Options traders were buying a lot of protection on the iShares Semiconductor ETF (SOXX) on Tuesday.

headlines.title: Fed’s Lisa Cook can stay at central bank while challenging Trump’s attempt to fire her, Supreme Court rules
headlines.summary: The Supreme Court refused to allow President Donald Trump to fire Federal Reserve governor Lisa Cook, in a move that strengthens the independence of the world’s most powerful central bank.

headlines.title: Rocket Lab to take on SpaceX’s Starlink with $8 billion acquisition
headlines.summary: Rocket Lab said it is buying Iridium as a “shortcut” to expanding its growing capabilities.

headlines.title: I’m 53 and want to retire in 12 years. Is 5% enough to put in my 401(k)?
headlines.summary: If you want to have enough for retirement, you need to push your savings limits today.

headlines.title: ‘I claimed Social Security at 62’: At 76, I’m working at Walmart. Why do I still owe payroll taxes?
headlines.summary: “It seems like half of the workforce at our local Walmart is over 65.”

headlines.title: Volkswagen’s stock nears a 15-year low on reports of massive planned layoffs
headlines.summary: Shares in the German carmaker slumped following reports of a plan to cut up to 100,000 jobs.

headlines.title: How the chip trade has come to resemble silver — a warning from Morgan Stanley’s Wilson
headlines.summary: Investors should shift away from popular momentum trades, says veteran Wall Street strategist Mike Wilson.
